name: Pumpkin Walnut Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Mix and pat the chopped walnuts, sugar, and butter into the bottom of a prepared springform pan to form the crust.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add sugar and beat again.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Stir in pumpkin, cornstarch, pumpkin pie spice, melted butter, brown sugar, and chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the mixture into the crust-lined pan.
7. Bake for 15 minutes in the preheated oven with a pan of water on the bottom rack.
8. Reduce temperature to 250°F and bake an additional 1-1/2 hours or until set.
9. Cool thoroughly, then chill before serving.
